author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.2.0-beta.0
body: # [5.2.0-beta.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.1.0...v5.2.0-beta.0) (2018-06-04) This new version introduce a complete revamp of the package structure, but it should be completely transparent for the users. If you have any troubles with this version please open a issue on [Github](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/new), thanks!
